chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3567 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Katcha Peshi. 2. For hearing of MA 15366/17 23.01.2018. Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. alongwith SIP Muhammad Essa Kumbhar P.S Pangrio, SIP Nasrullah Halepoto S.H.O P.S Mehmoodabad, Mirpurkhas and ASI Muhammad Khan, I.O of Crime No.90/2017 P.S Mehmoodabad, Mirpurkhas. Mr. Nasir Ahmed, Advocate for respondents No.5 and 6. Petitioners are present and submit that they have married with each other under valid nikahnama, which is on record at Page-27 of the case file, but due to this un-ceremonial marriage the parents of Petitioner Mst. Sana are not happy and they have lodged a false F.I.R. bearing Crime No.90/2017 at P.S Mehmoodabad under section 365-B, 452, 34 PPC. Petitioners also submit that they are living happily with each other but the private respondents at the behest of the official respondents are harassing them. Learned A.A.G files comments of the respondents No.3, and submits that the official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. Since the petitioners have married with each other as evident from nikahnama available on record at Page-27 of the case file, therefore, official respondents are directed to make sure that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioners. The Investigating Officer of the case is also present. He is directed to record statement of petitioner Mst. Sana (star witness) of the case under section 161, Cr.P.C and place the same before the concerned court for passing appropriate orders, till then no arrest shall be made against the persons who are nominated in the F.I.R.

He is directed to record statement of petitioner Mst. Sana (star witness) of the case under section 161, Cr.P.C and place the same before the concerned court for passing appropriate orders, till then no arrest shall be made against the persons who are nominated in the F.I.R. Since learned A.A.G already undertakes that the official respondents will act in accordance with law, therefore, this petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. Show cause notice issued to the S.H.O P.S Mehmoodabad stands vacated. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
